title: delphinium lorestanicum
intro: Delphinium lorestanicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, native to Iran. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Delphinium lorestanicum typically involve its roots, which can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
